scripts.dev:frontend: flutter pub get && flutter run -d chrome --web-port=3000 --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 --dart-define=GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=YOUR_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,frontend" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "flutter pub get && flutter run -d chrome --web-port=3000 --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 --dart-define=GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=YOUR_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"
